stemHtml: A copilot has passed an upgrading course to become a captain. Which psychological consequence is most likely?

options.a: An upgrading never has psychological consequences.
options.b: The increased command authority leads to a higher professionalism.
options.c: His/her self-concept is going to change because of new roles and tasks which have to be incorporated.
options.d: His/her self -concept is going to be stabilized because of the higher status as a captain.
